messages.content:
Evaluate the following startup idea:
  Title: Uber for Dog Walkers
  Problem: People are busy and can't always walk their dogs.
  Solution: An app that connects dog owners with local, vetted dog walkers on-demand.

  Provide a quality score from 0 to 100, structured feedback, a suggested category, and determine if it's spam or low-effort.

{"score": 85, "feedback": "Good validation of a common problem. Ensure you differentiate from existing competitors like Rover and Wag. Consider adding specialized services like pet sitting or training.", "category": "Services", "isSpam": false}

Evaluate the following startup idea:
  Title: asdfasdf
  Problem: asdf
  Solution: buy my crypto coin

  Provide a quality score from 0 to 100, structured feedback, a suggested category, and determine if it's spam or low-effort.
{"score": 0, "feedback": "This submission appears to be spam or low-effort. Please provide a genuine startup idea with a clear problem and solution.", "category": "None", "isSpam": true}

Evaluate the following startup idea:
  Title: AI-Powered Code Reviewer for Startups
  Problem: Small startup teams don't have time to thoroughly review all PRs, leading to bugs in production.
  Solution: A GitHub app that automatically reviews code, enforces style guides, and catches security vulnerabilities using an LLM.

  Provide a quality score from 0 to 100, structured feedback, a suggested category, and determine if it's spam or low-effort.

{"score": 92, "feedback": "Very strong idea targeting B2B developers. High willingness to pay if it saves time. Be prepared for strong competition from GitHub Copilot and other established AI dev tools.", "category": "Technology", "isSpam": false}
